testcase.name: test_05_create_share_request

failure.message: AssertionError: Response should contain request_id assert None is not None

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_export_pdf_and_revoke.py:175: in test_05_create_share_request assert request_id is not None, "Response should contain request_id" E AssertionError: Response should contain request_id E assert None is not None

testcase.name: test_06_get_share_requests
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_export_pdf_and_revoke.py:185: in test_06_get_share_requests assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 405: {"detail":"Method Not Allowed"} E assert 405 == 200 E + where 405 = <Response [405]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_07_revoke_share_request
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_export_pdf_and_revoke.py:210: in test_07_revoke_share_request assert list_resp.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {list_resp.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 405 E assert 405 == 200 E + where 405 = <Response [405]>.status_code
